prompt:
Subject: Afternoon Reading Corner

Main Subject:
A vertical photo-style portrait. An adult woman is seated on a beige upholstered bench in a calm, modern Japanese cafe lounge, positioned prominently to the left of the frame. She holds a book bound like a literary novel in her right hand with the cover facing out, while her left hand rests on the seat for support.

Character/Expression:
An adult woman with natural features. She has a mature, calm aura and a healthy proportion. Her dark long wavy brown hair is loose with a few strands framing her face. Elegant rose-toned makeup, natural under-eye bags, and subtle red lips. She tilts her head slightly to the left and looks calmly at the camera.

Clothing/Pose:
A black V-neck camisole dress. It has a subtle satin-like sheen with fine black lace at the neckline and hem, and a discrete waist seam for a delicate Japanese fashion aesthetic. The length is short but balanced to look elegant. No outerwear. Her right hand lightly grips the spine of the book, facing the cover toward the camera. Her left hand is on the bench, bearing her weight naturally. Her legs extend diagonally toward the bottom right, knees slightly together, wearing black enamel pumps.

Background/Lighting:
A quiet cafe space with wooden shelves, a round wooden table, a black mug, a large houseplant, and soft pendant lights reminiscent of shoji screens. Natural afternoon light enters from a window in the back right, creating soft highlights on her cheeks, shoulders, legs, and the edges of her black dress.

Composition/Camera:
Vertical composition, a near-full-body seated pose. The subject is in the center-left, with legs extending long to the bottom right. Pendant light and plant space at the top, round table and window view to the right. Low eye-level camera, 50mm equivalent natural compression.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression shot with a professional camera. Skin is not over-corrected, leaving natural texture and light bleeding. Meticulously depicts the subtle reflections of black satin, lace details, matte book cover, and the warmth of the wood and fabric bench.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor contact with book, floating, unnatural gravity, incorrect perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, gibberish text, copies of real book covers, logos, watermarks, character toys, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-looking skin.
